function.name: tavily_search
function.description: Search the web using Tavily AI. Returns relevant, up-to-date results with titles, URLs, and content snippets. Great for news, current events, Indonesian content, and general research. Use this for any question that requires real-time or recent information.

query.description: Search query. Can be a question or keywords. E.g. 'siapa dirjen Kemen PU yang baru dilantik 2025' or 'latest AI news May 2026'.

num_results.description: Number of results to return (1-10). Default: 5.

topic.description: Search topic filter. Use 'news' for current events, 'finance' for financial data. Default: 'general'.

time_range.description: Filter results by recency. E.g. 'week' for results from the past week.

include_answer.description: Include an AI-generated answer summary. Default: false.

function.name: tavily_extract
function.description: Extract clean content from one or more URLs. Use after tavily_search to get full page content, or to read any known URL. Returns clean text/markdown.

urls.description: List of URLs to extract content from (max 5).

query.description: Optional query to focus extraction on relevant content.
